3.title: Duration
3.query:
timeseries duration = avg(dt.synthetic.http.duration, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.http_check }
| fieldsAdd http_check_name = entityName(dt.entity.http_check)
| sort arrayAvg(duration) desc
| limit 20

4.title: Duration
4.query:
timeseries duration = avg(dt.synthetic.http.request.duration, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.http_check_step }
| fieldsAdd http_check_step_name = entityName(dt.entity.http_check_step)
| sort arrayAvg(duration) desc
| limit 20

5.title: Duration
5.query:
timeseries duration = avg(dt.synthetic.http.duration, rollup: avg),
  by: { dt.entity.synthetic_location }
| fieldsAdd synthetic_location_name = entityName(dt.entity.synthetic_location)
| sort arrayAvg(duration) desc
| limit 20

| fieldsAdd service_method_name = entityName(dt.entity.service_method)
| sort arrayAvg(count) desc
| limit 20

| fieldsAdd service_method_name = entityName(dt.entity.service_method)
| sort arrayAvg(failure_count) desc
| limit 20
